name: io.github.Nowah-xyz/nowah-travel
description: AI travel assistant — search and book flights, hotels, trip planning, 51M+ POIs, weather, visa requirements, flight tracking, seatmap intelligence, currency conversion, and travel safety info

tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search for flights between airports with flexible date/passenger options

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description: Search for hotels by city, dates, and guest count

tools.name: book_flight
tools.description: Book a flight offer for passengers

tools.name: find_pois
tools.description: Discover points of interest from 51M+ locations worldwide

tools.name: generate_itinerary
tools.description: Generate a day-by-day travel itinerary for a destination

tools.name: get_visa_requirements
tools.description: Check visa requirements between two countries

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather and forecasts for any location

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert between currencies with live exchange rates

tools.name: get_safety_info
tools.description: Get travel safety information for a country

tools.name: get_flight_info
tools.description: Track a flight by flight number

tools.name: get_airport_delays
tools.description: Check current delay status at an airport

tools.name: get_seat_info
tools.description: Get detailed seatmap and seat information for a flight

tools.name: get_seat_recommendations
tools.description: Get AI-powered seat recommendations based on preferences

tools.name: list_trips
tools.description: List all trips for the authenticated user

tools.name: chat_with_agent
tools.description: Chat with the Nowah AI travel agent
